name: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc.
description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing the North Island Copper-Gold Project on Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The project is a large-scale, long-life porphyry copper-gold development opportunity located in a top-tier mining jurisdiction with excellent infrastructure. NorthIsle is committed to developing the project in a sustainable and responsible manner, working closely with local communities and First Nations partners to create long-term value for all stakeholders while meeting the growing global demand for critical metals.
